---
title: "Inventory"
sidebar: references
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_references.py; edit specs/dasdae-inventory.yml instead. -->

Top-level DASDAE Inventory manifest that stores document metadata, shared resources, and network containers.

Aliases: `Inv`

## Attributes

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `schema_version` | int | Version of the DASDAE Inventory manifest envelope. |
| `resource_id` | str | Optional identifier for the inventory manifest. |
| `creation_info` | CreationInfo | QuakeML-style creation and update metadata. |
| `resources` | dict[str, _PublicInventoryItem] | Shareable resources keyed by resource_id. |
| `coordinate_reference_system` | [CoordinateReferenceSystem](CoordinateReferenceSystem.qmd) | Inventory-wide CRS used by all coordinate-bearing metadata. |
| `networks` | tuple[[Network](Network.qmd), ...] | Network containers in the inventory. |

## Contains

- [References](References.qmd)
- [Network](Network.qmd)
- [CoordinateReferenceSystem](CoordinateReferenceSystem.qmd)

## Contained By

_None._

## References

_None._

## Referenced By

_None._
